attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CGLR.RELATIONSHIP_ID, CGLR.SOURCE_LEDGER_ID, CGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_ID, CGLR.SLA_LEDGER_ID, CGLR.PRIMARY_LEDGER_ID, CGLR.TARGET_CURRENCY_CODE, CGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_NAME, CGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_SHORT_NAME, CGLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE, CGLR.RELATIONSHIP_TYPE_CODE, CGLR.RELATIONSHIP_ENABLED_FLAG, CGLR.INHERIT_CREATION_USER_FLAG, CGLR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CGLR.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CGLR.CREATION_DATE, CGLR.CREATED_BY, CGLR.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CGLR.GL_JE_CONVERSION_SET_ID, CGLR.SL_COA_MAPPING_ID, CGLR.AUTOMATIC_POST_FLAG, CGLR.ALC_DEFAULT_CONV_RATE_TYPE, CGLR.ALC_NO_RATE_ACTION_CODE, CGLR.ALC_MAX_DAYS_ROLL_RATE, CGLR.ALC_INHERIT_CONVERSION_TYPE, CGLR.ALC_INIT_CONV_OPTION_CODE, CGLR.ALC_INIT_PERIOD, CGLR.ALC_INIT_DATE, CGLR.ALC_INITIALIZING_RATE_DATE, CGLR.ALC_INITIALIZING_RATE_TYPE, CGLR.ALC_PERIOD_AVERAGE_RATE_TYPE, CGLR.ALC_PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE, CGLR.APPLICATION_ID, CGLR.ORG_ID, CGLR.DISABLE_CONVERSION_DATE, CGLR.STATUS_CODE, CGLR.HIST_CONV_STATUS_CODE, CGLR.GES_UPDATE_DATE, CGLR.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM CG1_GL_LEDGER_RELATIONSH CGLR WHERE CGLR.GES_UPDATE_DATE > TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
